title: Workflow monitor throws "actor is closed" error during active DurableAgent execution
body:
The workflow monitor raises an unhandled gRPC error while the workflow is still executing successfully. The error is non-fatal but noisy.
```
== APP - diagram-agent == INFO:durabletask-worker:231e8453401c4f8289df69b845e3e85f: Orchestrator yielded with 1 task(s) and 0 event(s) outstanding.
== APP - diagram-agent == ERROR:dapr_agents.workflow.runners.base:[agent-runner] 231e8453401c4f8289df69b845e3e85f: error while monitoring workflow outcome
== APP - diagram-agent == Traceback (most recent call last):
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/dapr_agents/workflow/runners/base.py", line 563, in _await_and_log_state
== APP - diagram-agent ==     state = await self._await_state(
== APP - diagram-agent ==             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/dapr_agents/workflow/runners/base.py", line 543, in _await_state
== APP - diagram-agent ==     return await asyncio.to_thread(_wait)
== APP - diagram-agent ==            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.12/3.12.4/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.12/lib/python3.12/asyncio/threads.py", line 25, in to_thread
== APP - diagram-agent ==     return await loop.run_in_executor(None, func_call)
== APP - diagram-agent ==            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.12/3.12.4/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.12/lib/python3.12/concurrent/futures/thread.py", line 58, in run
== APP - diagram-agent ==     result = self.fn(*self.args, **self.kwargs)
== APP - diagram-agent ==              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/dapr_agents/workflow/runners/base.py", line 537, in _wait
== APP - diagram-agent ==     return self._wf_client.wait_for_workflow_completion(
== APP - diagram-agent ==            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/dapr/ext/workflow/dapr_workflow_client.py", line 199, in wait_for_workflow_completion
== APP - diagram-agent ==     state = self.__obj.wait_for_orchestration_completion(
== APP - diagram-agent ==             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/durabletask/client.py", line 224, in wait_for_orchestration_completion
== APP - diagram-agent ==     res: pb.GetInstanceResponse = self._stub.WaitForInstanceCompletion(
== APP - diagram-agent ==                                   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/grpc/_interceptor.py", line 276, in __call__
== APP - diagram-agent ==     response, ignored_call = self._with_call(
== APP - diagram-agent ==                              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/grpc/_interceptor.py", line 331, in _with_call
== APP - diagram-agent ==     return call.result(), call
== APP - diagram-agent ==            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/grpc/_channel.py", line 438, in result
== APP - diagram-agent ==     raise self
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/grpc/_interceptor.py", line 314, in continuation
== APP - diagram-agent ==     response, call = self._thunk(new_method).with_call(
== APP - diagram-agent ==                      ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/opentelemetry/instrumentation/grpc/grpcext/_interceptor.py", line 92, in with_call
== APP - diagram-agent ==     return self._interceptor.intercept_unary(
== APP - diagram-agent ==            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/opentelemetry/instrumentation/grpc/_client.py", line 190, in intercept_unary
== APP - diagram-agent ==     return self._intercept(request, metadata, client_info, invoker)
== APP - diagram-agent ==            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/opentelemetry/instrumentation/grpc/_client.py", line 171, in _intercept
== APP - diagram-agent ==     raise exc
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/opentelemetry/instrumentation/grpc/_client.py", line 157, in _intercept
== APP - diagram-agent ==     result = invoker(request, metadata)
== APP - diagram-agent ==              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/opentelemetry/instrumentation/grpc/grpcext/_interceptor.py", line 82, in invoker
== APP - diagram-agent ==     return self._base_callable.with_call(
== APP - diagram-agent ==            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/grpc/_channel.py", line 1173, in with_call
== APP - diagram-agent ==     return _end_unary_response_blocking(state, call, True, None)
== APP - diagram-agent ==            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent ==   File "/Users/eileenyu/programming/diagram-agent/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/grpc/_channel.py", line 990, in _end_unary_response_blocking
== APP - diagram-agent ==     raise _InactiveRpcError(state)  # pytype: disable=not-instantiable
== APP - diagram-agent ==     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
== APP - diagram-agent == grpc._channel._InactiveRpcError: <_InactiveRpcError of RPC that terminated with:
== APP - diagram-agent ==       status = StatusCode.UNKNOWN
== APP - diagram-agent ==       details = "actor is closed, cannot handle deactivated"
== APP - diagram-agent ==       debug_error_string = "UNKNOWN:Error received from peer ipv4:34.248.40.116:443 {grpc_message:"actor is closed, cannot handle deactivated", grpc_status:2}"
== APP - diagram-agent == >
== APP - diagram-agent == 2026-03-12 17:15:45.591 durabletask-worker INFO: 231e8453401c4f8289df69b845e3e85f: Orchestrator yielded with 1 task(s) and 0 event(s) outstanding.
== APP - diagram-agent == INFO:durabletask-worker:231e8453401c4f8289df69b845e3e85f: Orchestrator yielded with 1 task(s) and 0 event(s) outstanding.
== APP - diagram-agent == INFO:dapr_agents.llm.utils.request:Tools are available in the request.
```

Expected: Retry or gracefully handle the deactivation instead of raising.
Versions: dapr-agents 0.13.0 and 1.0.0rc1, dapr SDK 1.17.x, Python 3.12
